title: Create Item When I'm Mentioned
excerpt: Is there any way to create an item on a specific board for any time my name is mentioned across all of our Workspaces and Boards?   I would like to convert a “mention” to a “task” on my global task board.  Thank you!

posts.author: ShellyD1979 (Michele Muldoon)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to create an item on a specific board for any time my name is mentioned across all of our Workspaces and Boards? I would like to convert a “mention” to a “task” on my global task board. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ShellyD1979,

At this time, this particular feature/function is not supported natively in the platform - apologies for the setback You might be able to achieve this using the API or a 3rd party integration, such as Integromat or Zapier and we encourage you to investigate these options.

You’re also welcome to post this question in our developers integrations section here - monday apps & integrations - monday Community Forum

  • monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum

That said, this is a great suggestion, and I’d be interested if you’d be happy for us to convert this into a feature request for other community members to vote on. The more votes, the better to help emphasis this need.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ShellyD1979 ,
Yes, you can use Make to create an item on a specific board whenever your name is mentioned across all of your Workspaces and Boards.

As a complimentary, here is our magic link to get 1 Month Pro plan free (10,000 operations):
